TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Ho_Iat_Seng, title = Ho_Iat_Seng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ho_Iat_Seng} }

S.FORM: = Ho Iat Seng = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 6 jiyax 12 ka Ho Iat Seng ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Macau ta sayang o kiya ka Ho Iat Seng, pnaah hngkawas 2019 idas 12 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ħo iat səŋ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħo iat səŋ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan maʦau ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħo iat səŋ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Ho Iat Seng = Mntucing hngkawas 1957 idas 6 jiyax 12 ka Ho Iat Seng ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Macau ta sayang o kiya ka Ho Iat Seng, pnaah hngkawas 2019 idas 12 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = ħo iat səŋ = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka ħo iat səŋ ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan maʦau ta sajaŋ o kija ka ħo iat səŋ, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
